archetypes.name: The Still Point
archetypes.description: Perfect equilibrium across all six axes. The broadcast's empty center.
examples: White House Shrugs Off Shaky Economy as War Exceeds Trump’s Timeline
White House Shrugs Off Shaky Economy as War Exceeds Trump’s Timeline
Why China Isn’t Pushing Iran to Accept U.S. Demands to End War

archetypes.name: The Hollow Headline
archetypes.description: Names and hedges match, but content and entities go. Shape without substance.
examples: US House votes down latest effort to curtail Trump’s power to wage Iran war
Ex-Arsenal and Liverpool keeper Manninger killed in car crash with train
‘Endless grief’: Turkiye mourns victims of second school shooting in a week

archetypes.name: The Clear Channel
archetypes.description: Signal passes through all five models with minimal shaping. Rare.
examples: Mamdani’s Tax Return: $1,600 From Rapping and $131,000 From Politics
Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth reads fake Bible verse from Pulp Fiction
Israel-Lebanon Cease-Fire: What to Know

archetypes.name: The Sharp Silence
archetypes.description: Names kept, verbs kept, hedges dropped, but content gone. Skeleton without meat.
examples: Australian ex-soldier Roberts-Smith granted bail in Afghan war crimes case
Irish fugitive and suspected crime boss Daniel Kinahan arrested in Dubai
Lebanese man removes Israeli flag from castle in southern Lebanon

archetypes.name: The Named Erasure
archetypes.description: Entities named but surrounded by hedging. Who did it is clear; what they did is fuzzy.
examples: Trump says Israel and Lebanon agree to temporary ceasefire
No date set for US-Iran talks, as Pakistan pushes to keep diplomacy alive
Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says

archetypes.name: The Unanimous Shield
archetypes.description: All models agree, preserve content, but wall it in attribution. Liability-aware.
examples: Pope follows Trump row by condemning 'tyrants' ravaging world with war
RFK Jr. Shifts Tone on Vaccines in Congressional Hearing
D4vd Arrested in Connection With Death of Celeste Rivas Hernandez

archetypes.name: The Cornering
archetypes.description: Models lockstep on compression. The narrowness of agreement is itself a signal.
examples: Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
New Jersey announces $150 transit tickets to reach the World Cup

archetypes.name: The Polished Unity
archetypes.description: Smooth agreement. Facts preserved, language softened, claims buffered.
examples: Bahrain Charges Intelligence Officer in the Death of a Detainee
Trump to Nominate Dr. Erica Schwartz, a Vaccine Supporter, as CDC Director
Got $100 Million? Ukraine Has Just the Fertilizer Plant for You.

archetypes.name: The Sealed Vault
archetypes.description: Total compression. Models agree to erase, soften, abstract, and hedge. The signal is gone.
examples: A ceasefire in Lebanon — will it hold?
How Israel’s war upended daily life in Lebanon
Iran war: What is happening on day 50 of the US-Iran conflict?

archetypes.name: The Quiet Cull
archetypes.description: Direct but compressed. Models don't hedge, they just leave things out.
examples: Iran war live: Ceasefire starts in Lebanon as Trump says Tehran deal close
Iran war’s big winners: Wall Street, weapons firms, AI and green energy
Sudan’s Prime Minister: This is the path out of the horrors of war

archetypes.name: The Soft Consensus
archetypes.description: Source preserved but delivery softened. The facts are there, muted.
examples: New Bulgarian Coalition Claims ‘Uncontested Victory’ in Election
Ignoring the War Has Been Working for Long-Term Investors
At White House Correspondents Dinner, Trump Will Dine With Reporters He’s Been R

archetypes.name: The Phantom Chorus
archetypes.description: Content preserved but entities dropped across all models. Who did what, unnamed.
examples: With Vaccines Widely Popular, Kennedy Changes Tone, but Maybe Not His Plans
Stocks Hit Records on Iran Truce Hopes. Why the Rally May Have Further to Run.
Can U.S. Blockade Iranian-Linked Ships Anywhere in the World? Yes, But …

archetypes.name: The Namedrop
archetypes.description: Everything survives except the people. Story intact, actors abstract.
examples: Federal Appeals Court Opens Door to Moving Trans Inmates Under Trump Gender Orde
Fourth Kanye West concert cancelled
Iran War Live Updates: Oil Prices Rise as Iran Vows Retaliation for Cargo Ship A

archetypes.name: The Lone Wolf
archetypes.description: One model breaks from the pack. Others preserve. Worth investigating the outlier.
examples: Israel and Lebanon Agree to a Cease-Fire Deal
Israel and Lebanon Agree to a Cease-Fire Deal
Who Are D4vd and Celeste Rivas Hernandez?

archetypes.name: The Smoothed Pact
archetypes.description: Content preserved, entities abstracted, tone softened. Diplomatic register.
examples: House Votes to Extend Expiring FISA Surveillance Law for 10 Days
Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz as Iran Declares Strict Control of Vital Ship
Pakistan’s Leaders Try to Contain Rising Anger Over Iran War at Home

archetypes.name: The Split Witness
archetypes.description: One model sees differently. Others preserve but differ on compression.
examples: Iran war live: Tehran says Trump made ‘false’ claims, amid peace talks
Bulgarians head to polls for eighth time in five years

archetypes.name: The Divided Softening
archetypes.description: Split disagreement with softening. Models hedge differently.
examples: Stocks Extend Rally as Tensions Ease Over War in Iran
How the Cole Disaster Drove the U.S. to Develop New Warship Defenses

archetypes.name: The Naming Battle
archetypes.description: Models scatter on everything except keeping verbs.
examples: ‘Trump forced Israel into a ceasefire’ with Lebanon
Why Dow stock fell 10% on Friday

archetypes.name: The Faceless Signal
archetypes.description: Content survives, entities erased, one model breaks.
examples: Lebanon Cease-Fire Leaves Netanyahu in an Uncomfortable Spot
Labor Secretary Resigns Amid Scandals, and F.B.I. Director Sues Over Drinking Cl

archetypes.name: The Open Hedge
archetypes.description: Models disagree on tone but share directness. Mixed signals.
examples: The President Is Coming to the White House Correspondents’ Dinner

archetypes.name: The Sealed Chorus
archetypes.description: Unified heavy compression with tight spread. Consensus of omission.

archetypes.name: The Anonymized Drone
archetypes.description: Names survive but everything else is softened and hedged.

archetypes.name: The Open Field
archetypes.description: Models disagree but each preserves. No collective suppression, just divergent takes.

archetypes.name: The Panicked Hush
archetypes.description: Models disagree on what to compress but all compress. Confused alignment.

archetypes.name: The Scatter Signal
archetypes.description: Disagreement on framing but nobody drops content. Healthy diversity.

archetypes.name: The One Outlier
archetypes.description: Everything clean except one model runs hot. Watch the outlier.

archetypes.name: The Entity Refuge
archetypes.description: Total compression except names survive. The story is gone but the actors remain.

archetypes.name: The Sharp Cornering
archetypes.description: Named, direct, but everything else compressed. One model breaks.

archetypes.name: The Gentle Break
archetypes.description: Mostly healthy but softened with one divergent model. Subtle dissent.

archetypes.name: The Buffered Scatter
archetypes.description: Models scatter with hedges. Even the disagreement is qualified.

archetypes.name: The Clean Compression
archetypes.description: Everything sharp and named but compressed. Surgical editing with one break.

archetypes.name: The Uneasy Unity
archetypes.description: Tight spread but models disagree. Tension without divergence.
